features: Crystal-Clear, Streak-Free Finish – Specially formulated to leave glass, mirrors, windows, and windscreens sparkling clean with zero streaks or smudges. Can be used on inside
Multi-Surface Shine – Perfect for car windows, bathroom mirrors, and household glass surfaces – a must-have for your cleaning kit at home or on the go.
Effortlessly Lifts Dirt, Dust & Grime – Each wipe is infused with a powerful formula that cuts through everyday build-up for a flawless, polished look.
100% Biodegradable Wipes – Made with eco-friendly, plant-based fibres – tough on mess, gentle on the planet.
Value Twin Pack – 60 Wipes Total – Includes 2 x resealable packs of 30 wipes, ideal for keeping in your car, bathroom, or cleaning caddy for anytime use.
description: Product description Get a crystal-clear view wherever you are with these Glass & Mirror Cleaning Wipes – the ultimate solution for spotless surfaces on the go or at home. Each pack includes 30 pre-moistened wipes designed to cut through dirt, dust, and grease on all glass and mirror surfaces. This value twin pack gives you 60 wipes in total, perfect for car accessories, home cleaning kits, or your office drawer. These car wipes are ideal for keeping your windshield and windows clean without the need for sprays or cloths. Whether you’re tidying up your dashboard, mirrors, or in-vehicle displays, they’re the perfect addition to your car wipes interior and car interior wipes collection. Also suitable as car glass wipes or car window wipes, they’re safe to use on tints and screens. Use them as window wipes for home to freshen up bathroom mirrors, shower screens, or household windows. Their streak-free formula makes them excellent window cleaning wipes, giving you a brilliant shine with no smears or residue. They also double up as quick and effective glasses cleaning wipes when you’re in a pinch. Made from 100% biodegradable, plant-based fibres, these glass cleaning wipes are as kind to the planet as they are effective on surfaces. Keep them in your glovebox, handbag, or cleaning caddy for a quick, eco-friendly clean anytime. window wipes for home Shiny, Streak-Free Finish – Perfect for glass, mirrors, windows, and windscreens – no smears, just crystal clarity. Multi-Use Wipes – Ideal for car glass, interior car surfaces, household windows, and personal items like glasses. Removes Dirt, Dust & Grime – Cuts through everyday build-up for a spotless shine in seconds. 100% Biodegradable – Plant-based materials that break down naturally – clean your space, not the planet. 60 Wipes Total (2 x 30 Packs) – Resealable packs keep wipes fresh and ready wherever you need them. Ingredients 5-chloro-2-methyl-2h-isothiazol-3-one [EC no 247-500-7] and 2-methyl-2h-isothiazol-3-one [EC no 220-239-6]
